base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_push_start_2p — a ui from 1980 pac man. PUSH START BUTTON / 1 OR 2 PLAYERS / BONUS PUCKMAN FOR ___ PTS / © namco 1980 — Japanese 2-player-enabled ROM variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
